_comment: Per-skill default operating mode + the global safe-set / never-autofix lists. See shared/modes-and-policies.md.
safeSet: rename an unnamed or auto-named layer to a semantic name
replace a raw value that EXACTLY equals an existing token's resolved value with that token
reorder documentation pages or layer trees without changing geometry
neverAutofix: creating, deleting, or restructuring variants or components
creating a new token (propose; human approves name/value/tier)
deleting or renaming shared library assets
any token swap that is a near-match rather than an exact equality
rule: Auto-fix is opt-in per change type, never per skill wholesale. When in doubt, downgrade to Apply-with-review.
